title: tsuga chinensis subsp. patens
intro: Tsuga chinensis subsp. patens, also known as Japanese hemlock or eastern hemlock, is a species of evergreen coniferous tree native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Tsuga chinensis subsp. patens include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving respiratory health. Tsuga chinensis subsp. patens is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture in herbal medicine, with its extracts also being used in modern pharmacological research.
